prompt: A cute pastel Japanese nursery school monthly meal calendar poster, styled like a soft watercolor children’s print on a clean white background. The design is landscape and highly organized like a printable daycare menu sheet. At the top center, a large headline in playful rounded Japanese typography reads 5月の献立表, with a smaller pink ribbon-style subtitle underneath reading 0歳児クラス・後期食（9〜11ヶ月頃）. Decorate the header with 2 smiling baby illustrations holding bowls, 2 carp streamer flags, 1 small blue origami boat, a pink speech bubble on the upper right with Japanese text やわらかくて 食べやすい 離乳食です, and 2 purple flowers beside it. Create a 6-column monthly calendar grid with rounded pastel tab headers for the weekdays in Japanese: 月, 火, 水, 木, 金, 土. Fill 25 dated cells for the visible month layout, covering dates 1, 2, 4, 5, 6, 7, 8, 9, 11, 12, 13, 14, 15, 16, 18, 19, 20, 21, 22, 23, 25, 26, 27, 28, 29, 30, with some blank leading cells at the beginning of the month. Use thin pink grid lines and a gentle pastel palette. Mark 3 holiday cells in red Japanese text: 4 with "みどりの日" and "休園", 5 with "こどもの日" and "休園", and 6 with "振替休日" and "休園". Add small seasonal illustrations in the early empty and holiday cells: 1 chick with a clover, 1 sandwich, 1 flower cluster, 1 leaf sprig, 1 clover and tree, 1 samurai helmet with a flag, 1 tree with a flower. In each meal day cell, show tiny menu text in Japanese with miniature food illustrations such as bowls of porridge, soup, vegetables, fruit, yogurt, bread, cookies, and snacks. Include visible snack lines beginning with "おやつ：" on the meal days. Along the bottom, add a horizontal legend row with 10 labeled food icons: おかゆ, パン, 魚, 鶏肉, 豚肉, 豆腐, にんじん, ほうれん草, とうもろこし, 果物, ヨーグルト. At bottom left, place a rounded note box with the Japanese disclaimer ※SNS掲載用に、内容を一部改変しております。. At bottom right, add a small pink encouragement bubble reading 毎日の成長を応援しています♪ with a tiny smiling baby illustration. Overall look: heartwarming, easy to read, child-friendly, kawaii daycare handout, soft watercolor texture, rounded shapes, pastel pink, cream, yellow, blue, and green accents, polished editorial poster quality.
